title: annona neoelliptica
intro: Annona neoelliptica, also known as the Elephant Apple or Annello, is a tropical plant native to the Philippines and Indonesia, belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant's fruits, leaves, and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Annona neoelliptica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Annona neoelliptica can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
